send_to_cs: Shipping inquiries on a current order
For product or general inquiries you can't find the answer to, use PGI shortcut
escalate: No escalations for this client, send everything to CS
tone: Don't use the word "unfortunately" to discuss our appointment structure
Don't use the word "best" to reference a product (e.g., best ring, etc.)
templates: If cx are looking for an engagement ring and don't provide specifics, use LER shortcut
dos_and_donts: If the customer responds incorrectly to the journey, don't send jny temp, recommend items based on their selection instead
Cx can create their own engagement ring on the webiste by choosing a setting, stone and size
Cx can customize rings by working with designers who will use their ideas, drawings, images to create the ring they want
Don't disclose the locations of their labs/production facilities
drive_to_purchase: Be MORE SALESY, if the customer is showing intent to purchase then:
➜ Ask open-ended general questions such as style & material
➜ After asking open-ended questions, transition to specific questions such as center stone, etc.
➜ If the customer liked our recommendation, push for the sale by asking about payment options or when they hope to have the item
promo_and_exclusions: Please see here for current offer details: https://www.brilliantearth.com/promo-codes-and-offers/

escalation_preferences: For questions regarding order, service, shipping questions on a current order, post-purchase will go to cssupport@brilliantearth.com
For product or general inquiry questions, please contact info@brilliantearth.com

conversation.message_text:
Good Dye Young: Hey Nevaeh! Team GDY here just checking in on your vibrant hair journey. If you need inspiration or have question, text back and we'll be happy to help!

In the meantime, use code GDY20 for 20% off your next purchase. Check out what's new -> https://gooddyeyoung.attn.tv/aprex7atA-be

Good Dye Young: Hey I'm Devon, your personal shopping assistant. 

I'm here to answer any questions, share recommendations, or assist in any way. Is there anything I can help you with?

https://gooddyeyoung.attn.tv/aKn_g1FIcnnW .
Hiii I received a package today for pink puff and grave digger but my box came damaged
Some of the paint was chipped off and the box was a little worn down

Good Dye Young: I'm so sorry to hear your orders arrived in that condition. Ensuring your order arrives perfectly is our priority, and we regret that we fell short this time. 

What I'll do is check this with my team for you. Can you please send me a photo of the items that you received, along with your order number and email address?
Order number- 111838Email- nevaehhernandez710@gmail.com
Good Dye Young: Thanks for the info and the photo. I will pass this along to my team and get back to you as soon as possible. Hang tight!
Thank you so much!
It's no big deal really I was just a little bummed presentation wise because of love this brand

Good Dye Young: I completely understand. As soon as I hear back, I will send you a message right away! While I wait to hear back from my team, is there anything else I can assist you with in the meantime?
No rush totally but that's it sorry lol
Good Dye Young: I appreciate your patience. I'll be in touch!
